title: Upload multiple images at once to items and workdocs
excerpt: Would like the ability to upload multiple images at once to items and workdocs rather than 1 at a time. Or Drag and Drop functionality to drag images into a work doc.

posts.author: CWithrow (Christina Withrow)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like the ability to upload multiple images at once to items and workdocs rather than 1 at a time. Or Drag and Drop functionality to drag images into a work doc.
